title: Marianela
writer: Benito Perojo, Benito Pérez Galdós, Joaquín Álvarez Quintero
actors: Mary Carrillo, Julio Peña, Rafael Calvo
plot: Marianela (Nela) is an orphan young girl living in a small village where she guides the blind young son of a rich country man. She is secretly in love with him, knowing that he loves her only because he can't see her ugly face. Bu...
